title: Is it possible to max out sub-items within a board/account?
excerpt:
Why did we get an error saying we are maxed out in subtasks? Is that possible? 
Are there limits on the number of subtasks we can create for a board? or an account in case? Thank you!

posts.author: TJ_S (TJS)
posts.cookedHtml:
Why did we get an error saying we are maxed out in subtasks? Is that possible?
Are there limits on the number of subtasks we can create for a board? or an account in case? Thank you!

posts.author: andrewalmand (Andrew Almand)
posts.cookedHtml:
@TJ_S

I would email support directly on this. You will probably get a response quicker and if its a bug they can help directly. support@monday.com

posts.author: TJ_S (TJS)
posts.cookedHtml: Already did, Thanks! Seems like their support ticketing system is very slow.

posts.author: andrewalmand (Andrew Almand)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes its been slower lately than in the past. Response is about 1 day currenlty.

posts.author: Shiran_Mund (Shiran Mund)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @TJ_S,
There is no limitation on the number of subitems, so it seems like a bug.
In case the issue still persisting, please reach out to our support team.

posts.author: Shiran_Mund (Shiran Mund)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @andrewalmand,
I’m sorry to hear you experienced slowness with the responses from our Support team.
Maybe at this time we were experiencing some slowness, but we are working within our SLA and try to reply as soon as possible.

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
